title: Eid ul Fitr
text:
First Salah - Takbeerat starts at 7:30AM in sha Allah 
Second Salah - Takbeerat starts at 9:00AM in sha Allah 
Please pay Zakat ul Fitr $10 per family member immediately 

 IALFM BOD

title: Eid Takbeerat
text:
اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، لَا إلَهَ إلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاَللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ وَلِلَّهِ الْحَمْدُ

اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرًا، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا، لَا إلَهَ إلَّا اللَّهُ وَلَا نَعْبُدُ إلَّا إيَّاهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْكَافِرُونَ، لَا إلَهَ إلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ، صَدَقَ وَعْدَهُ، وَنَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ، وَأَعَزَّ جُنْدَهُ وَهَزَمَ الْأَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهُ، لَا إلَهَ إلَّا اللَّهُ وَاَللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ

Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, there is no deity but Allah. Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, and to Allah belongs the praise.

Allah is Greatest indeed, and all praise is due to Allah in abundance, and glory be to Allah in the morning and evening. There is no deity but Allah alone, He has fulfilled His promise, granted victory to His servant, strengthened His soldiers, and defeated the confederates alone. There is no deity but Allah and we worship none but Him, sincere in religion for Him, even if the disbelievers dislike it.
